message:
fix(clippy): resolve 6 lint errors blocking cargo clippy --all-targets

- restore_scrollback: use String::new() instead of "".into() for empty strings
- semantic_quality: use HashSet::from([x]) instead of [x].into_iter().collect()
- snapshot_engine: use std::slice::from_ref(&p1) instead of &[p1.clone()]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
